certifications.title: Certifications
certifications.paragraph: A collection of certifications that reflect my commitment to continuous learning across software engineering, web development, backend systems, databases, and artificial intelligence.

items.title: Node.js
items.description: Validated backend development skills using Node.js, including asynchronous programming, modules, REST APIs, and package management.

items.title: AI Foundations
items.description: Completed foundational AI learning covering machine learning, NLP, computer vision, responsible AI, and real-world applications.

items.title: SQL (Basic)
items.description: Validated SQL fundamentals including filtering, joins, aggregation, and querying relational databases.

items.title: CSS (Basic)
items.description: Demonstrated CSS fundamentals including layouts, typography, selectors, positioning, and responsive design.

items.title: JavaScript (Basic)
items.description: Certified understanding of JavaScript syntax, functions, arrays, objects, and problem-solving fundamentals.

items.title: Python (Basic)
items.description: Covered Python syntax, data structures, control flow, functions, and introductory programming concepts.

items.title: Responsive Web Design
items.description: Built responsive websites using HTML, CSS, Flexbox, Grid, and mobile-first development practices.

items.title: Introduction to Front-End Development
items.description: Introduced core front-end technologies including HTML, CSS, JavaScript, browser rendering, and UI fundamentals.

items.title: JavaScript for Beginners
items.description: Learned JavaScript fundamentals including DOM manipulation, events, variables, functions, and browser scripting.

items.title: Introduction to CSS
items.description: Learned CSS styling techniques including layouts, spacing, typography, animations, and responsive design.

items.title: Problem Solving (Basic)
items.description: Validated logical thinking and problem-solving through coding challenges and algorithmic exercises.

items.title: React (Basic)
items.description: Validated React fundamentals including JSX, components, props, state, and hooks.

items.title: REST API
items.description: Demonstrated understanding of REST architecture, HTTP methods, endpoints, request handling, and API integration.

items.title: JavaScript Algorithms and Data Structures
items.description: Completed JavaScript programming challenges focused on algorithms, data structures, and problem solving.

items.title: Front End Development Libraries
items.description: Worked with React, Redux, Bootstrap, and modern front-end libraries to build interactive user interfaces.

items.title: Back End Development and APIs
items.description: Covered backend development using Node.js, Express.js, MongoDB, REST APIs, and authentication concepts.
